name: django-orm-intellisense
description: VS Code extension scaffold for Django ORM development assistance.

commands.title: Django ORM Intellisense: Configure Pylance Diagnostics
Django ORM Intellisense: Select Settings Module
Django ORM Intellisense: Select Python Interpreter

djangoOrmIntellisense.autoStart.description: Automatically start the Python analysis daemon when the extension activates.

djangoOrmIntellisense.pythonInterpreter.description: Python interpreter used by the analysis daemon. You can point it either at the executable itself or at a virtualenv root such as .venv. Use the command 'Django ORM Intellisense: Select Python Interpreter' to choose it. If empty, the extension falls back to python3.

djangoOrmIntellisense.settingsModule.description: Optional DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE override passed to the analysis daemon. Use the command 'Django ORM Intellisense: Select Settings Module' to choose from discovered candidates.

djangoOrmIntellisense.workspaceRoot.description: Optional workspace root override for the Python analysis daemon. Useful when the VS Code workspace is a larger monorepo and the Django project lives in a subdirectory.

djangoOrmIntellisense.logLevel.description: Controls how much daemon lifecycle logging is written to the extension output channel.
